name: Content Marketing
description: 56-day slow-burn educational content campaign that builds authority and community through consistent value delivery.

phases.name: foundation
phases.label: Foundation & Research
phases.goal: Establish content pillars, publish cornerstone pieces, and set the editorial calendar. Build initial SEO footprint and email funnel.

spokeCadence.emailBlasts: 1 total (day 7 — welcome series with content digest)

themeBank: State of the Industry: What the Data Shows
The Question Everyone's Afraid to Ask

phases.name: education
phases.label: Education & Value
phases.goal: Publish consistently valuable how-to content. Build email list through lead magnets. Establish a predictable content rhythm readers rely on.

spokeCadence.socialPosts: 1-2 per day, tip threads and micro-lessons
spokeCadence.emailBlasts: 2 total (day 17 lead magnet delivery, day 24 weekly digest)
spokeCadence.paidAds: Lead magnet promotion, email capture optimized
spokeCadence.influencerTouchpoints: Guest post exchanges with 2-3 niche experts

themeBank: Tool Stack: What We Actually Use
Quick Wins You Can Implement Today

phases.name: authority
phases.label: Authority & Thought Leadership
phases.goal: Shift from how-to to why and what-if. Publish original research, contrarian takes, and expert interviews. Drive backlinks and media mentions.

spokeCadence.socialPosts: 1-2 per day, opinion and insight posts
spokeCadence.emailBlasts: 3 total (day 30 research report, day 35 expert interview, day 40 roundup)
spokeCadence.paidAds: Retarget content readers with deeper pieces
spokeCadence.influencerTouchpoints: Publish 2 expert interview articles, podcast guest appearances

themeBank: Original Research: We Analyzed [X] Data Points
Contrarian Take: Why [Popular Advice] Is Wrong
Lessons from [Case Study]: What Actually Worked

phases.name: community
phases.label: Community & Flywheel
phases.goal: Convert readers into community members. Launch UGC initiatives, discussion forums, or contributor programs. Build the content flywheel that runs without you.

spokeCadence.socialPosts: 1 per day, UGC and community features
spokeCadence.paidAds: Minimal — focus on organic and referral
spokeCadence.influencerTouchpoints: Launch contributor/ambassador program, invite top engaged followers

themeBank: Open Call: Contribute to Our Blog
Monthly Roundup: Best of the Community
